summary: US CENTCOM reports attacking Iranian missile and drone storage sites and coastal radar facilities on 26 June in response to Iran's drone attack on a commercial vessel near the Strait of Hormuz. Israel and Lebanon are reportedly nearing a framework agreement with a security appendix, as Lebanese Armed Forces deploy toward the southern suburbs of Beirut. Israeli forces conducted operations in southern Lebanon and the occupied West Bank.
key_points: US CENTCOM reports attacking Iranian missile and drone storage sites and coastal radar facilities on 26 June in response to a drone attack on a commercial vessel near the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: @presstv/195809)
Iranian Khatam al-Anbia commanders stated that if the US cannot restrain the Zionist regime, the Islamic Republic of Iran will respond to these dangerous steps. (Source: @lelotsenzura/93232)
An Israeli source confirms the Israel-Lebanon framework agreement is expected to be signed in the coming hours, with a security appendix. (Source: @almogboker78/17595)
Israeli Defense Minister Katz stated that if Iran attacks Israel, it will be its biggest mistake yet, and nothing will stop Israeli forces. (Source: @lelotsenzura/93234)

IDF Spokesperson reports that earlier today the Air Force, directed by Unit Eguz forces, eliminated seven Hezbollah terrorists who transferred weapons near IDF forces in southern Lebanon at the Al-Manzalah position. (Source: @New_security8200/202091)
Lebanese Armed Forces are sending large reinforcements toward the southern suburbs via the airport road in Beirut. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80020)
IDF forces stormed the town of Halhoul in the occupied West Bank and fired tear gas. (Source: @presstv/195808)
Protests erupted in Beirut near the government serail following the agreement with Israel, with Hezbollah supporters demonstrating near Rafic Hariri Airport. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80014)

Israeli forces conducted operations in southern Lebanon and the occupied West Bank.

sections.threat_assessment: The operational environment is highly volatile with simultaneous escalations across multiple theaters. The US attack on Iranian missile and drone storage sites and coastal radar facilities represents a significant direct military confrontation with Iran, following Iran's drone attack on a commercial vessel near the Strait of Hormuz. Iran's IRGC Quds Force commander has increased threats toward Israel, and the Iranian Foreign Ministry has promised a rapid and decisive response. In Lebanon, the imminent framework agreement between Israel, Lebanon, and the US is generating domestic opposition, with Hezbollah supporters protesting near Rafic Hariri Airport and Lebanese Armed Forces deploying reinforcements toward the southern suburbs of Beirut. Israeli forces continue active operations in southern Lebanon and the occupied West Bank.
sections.regional_response: Iran's Khatam al-Anbia commanders have issued a statement warning that the Islamic Republic of Iran will respond to dangerous steps if the US cannot restrain the Zionist regime. The Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson announced that the response to the American attack will be rapid and decisive, and claimed Iran repelled a US attack on Sirri Island in the Strait of Hormuz. In Lebanon, Lebanese Armed Forces are deploying large reinforcements toward the southern suburbs via the airport road in Beirut, while protests have erupted near the government serail in Beirut following the agreement. Hezbollah supporters are demonstrating near Rafic Hariri Airport against the agreement. In the UAE, alerts were reported following missile fire.
sections.intelligence_notes: The US attack on Iran appears to be a direct response to Iran's drone attack on a commercial vessel near the Strait of Hormuz, with US CENTCOM specifically targeting missile and drone storage sites and coastal radar facilities. The Israel-Lebanon framework agreement with a security appendix represents a potential diplomatic development, though it faces domestic opposition in Lebanon. Israeli Defense Minister Katz issued a direct warning to Iran, stating that an attack on Israel would be its biggest mistake. The IDF continues counterterrorism operations in southern Lebanon targeting Hezbollah weapons transfer activities and in the occupied West Bank. The situation across multiple theaters requires close monitoring for further escalation.
